## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages / PR title follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (required for release-please)
- [ ] `dotnet build -c Release` and `dotnet pack -c Release` succeed locally
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/`) if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable): Closes #
